notes: Captures the rough multi-squid layout of the photo but the silhouettes are broken, arms/tentacles are essentially missing, and the interior is noisy contour clutter rather than FAO-style clean ink with sparse stipple.
specific_issues: broken / discontinuous mantle outline on all three silhouettes
tentacles and arms not drawn — right-side terminations are blobby stubs
fins not clearly resolved as a separate continuous edge
chromatophore field rendered as squiggly closed contours instead of stipple dots
eyes reduced to tiny dots with no almond outline or proper pupil
no ring suckers anywhere on the arms
fewer squid drawn than visible in the photo (3 vs 4–5)
horizontal seams between squid look like artifacts rather than overlapping anatomy
overall reads as a noisy edge-detect trace, not an FAO scientific plate
